subject: Alolan Graveler — dark crystalline spherical rock creature with Alolan regional form; confirmed Alolan (not Kanto) by dark purple crystal body
description: A large, roughly spherical creature covered in dark, angular crystalline formations stands in a rocky outdoor setting. The body is darker and more jagged than a standard Graveler, with visible purple-black crystal protrusions — the diagnostic visual marker of the Alolan regional form. Multiple arm-like limbs are visible. The pose is wide and grounded. Rocky terrain fills the background.
foreground: large dark crystalline spherical rock creature, multiple limbs, jagged crystal protrusions
